obligations.rule: The input must be a valid URL according to default options.
obligations.why: Baseline validation for URLs without custom options.

obligations.rule: The input must include a protocol if `require_protocol` is true.
obligations.why: Ensures URLs without protocols are rejected when required.

obligations.rule: The input must include a host if `require_host` is true.
obligations.why: Ensures URLs without hosts are rejected when required.

obligations.rule: The input must include a port if `require_port` is true.
obligations.why: Ensures URLs without ports are rejected when required.

obligations.rule: The input must use a valid protocol from the `protocols` list if `require_valid_protocol` is true.
obligations.why: Ensures invalid or unsupported protocols are rejected.

obligations.rule: The input must not contain underscores in the host unless `allow_underscores` is true.
obligations.why: Underscores are not valid in domain names unless explicitly allowed.

obligations.rule: The input must not end with a trailing dot unless `allow_trailing_dot` is true.
obligations.why: Trailing dots are not valid in domain names unless explicitly allowed.

obligations.rule: The input must not contain fragments if `allow_fragments` is false.
obligations.why: Fragments are disallowed when `allow_fragments` is false.

obligations.rule: The input must not contain query components if `allow_query_components` is false.
obligations.why: Query components are disallowed when `allow_query_components` is false.

obligations.rule: The input must not contain authentication information if `disallow_auth` is true.
obligations.why: Authentication components are disallowed when `disallow_auth` is true.

obligations.rule: The input must not exceed the maximum allowed length if `validate_length` is true.
obligations.why: Excessively long URLs are disallowed when `validate_length` is true.

test_groups.title: Default URL validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers baseline URL validation with default options.

test_groups.title: Require protocol
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs without protocols are rejected when `require_protocol` is true.

test_groups.title: Require host
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs without hosts are rejected when `require_host` is true.

test_groups.title: Require port
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs without ports are rejected when `require_port` is true.

test_groups.title: Valid protocols only
test_groups.rationale: Ensures only valid protocols from the `protocols` list are accepted.

test_groups.title: Allow underscores in host
test_groups.rationale: Tests allowing underscores in hostnames when `allow_underscores` is true.

test_groups.title: Allow trailing dot
test_groups.rationale: Tests allowing trailing dots in domain names when `allow_trailing_dot` is true.

test_groups.title: Disallow fragments
test_groups.rationale: Ensures fragments are disallowed when `allow_fragments` is false.

test_groups.title: Disallow query components
test_groups.rationale: Ensures query components are disallowed when `allow_query_components` is false.

test_groups.title: Disallow authentication
test_groups.rationale: Ensures authentication components are disallowed when `disallow_auth` is true.

test_groups.title: Validate maximum length
test_groups.rationale: Ensures excessively long URLs are disallowed when `validate_length` is true.
